sourceSections.title: Platform constraints
sourceSections.text: The prototype must be a keyboard-only web demo. The same prototype must require touch-only mobile gestures.

requirements.evidenceBoundary: source-linked requirement; not generated authority; review required before any prototype draft or apply.

boundary: manual or structured extraction first; llm extraction advisory only; untrusted until rust/local validation; review-gated apply required later; no autonomous unrestricted game creation; not prototype generation authority.
